$comment: Kaldırım Skoru transparent scoring config (PLAYBOOK 4.3). Weights and caps are editable WITHOUT a code change; the Go API loads this file at startup. ContributionPerClass = weight * min(count/P, cap) * avgConfidence; Score = max(0, 100 - sum). Class keys are the canonical merged allowlist enforced at the sidecar boundary.
